account.title: account
account.cancel_warning: ⚠ scheduled to cancel at period end
account.portal_note: Receipt / card / cancellation via Stripe billing portal (auto-redirect by customer id in next slice).
account.cli_intro: Drive the 8-verb pipeline from your terminal. The CLI authenticates with a personal access token (PAT) issued below.
account.cli_no_keys: No tokens yet. Token issuance lands in the next slice — for now, run the CLI in dev mode against localhost.
account.cli_disclaimer: Tokens are scoped per workspace and can be revoked anytime. Last 4 digits shown only — full token is displayed once at creation.
account.usage_intro: This-month resource consumption. Subscription seat is included; all GCP compute lines bill directly via your linked Google Cloud project.
account.usage_disclaimer: Live numbers ship via BigQuery export integration. * Gemini tokens within plan quota are included; overage rolls to GCP.

pricing.title: pricing
pricing.subtitle: Monthly subscription · 14-day free trial · card on file, first charge after trial ends
pricing.footer: Subscription fee covers seats + product access. GPU/TPU compute runs on Google Cloud (Vertex AI · Cloud Run · GKE) and is billed by actual usage — no RunPod, no Vast.ai, no third-party GPU broker.
pricing.gcp_subtitle: Public list prices, us-central1. Billed directly by Google — varies by region, sustained-use discount, committed-use discount, and free tier.
pricing.gcp_disclaimer: Snapshot for reference. Authoritative pricing: cloud.google.com/pricing. Free tier covers most discover-stage usage.

dashboard.title: workbench
dashboard.assist_note: Gemini drafts only — verify stays deterministic (0 LLM verdicts).
dashboard.blurb_discover: diverge a new domain · break a gap
dashboard.empty_body: Select a registered domain, or start a new one with discover.

landing.title: The AI-native technical-design pipeline
landing.sub: spec → structure → design → analyze → synthesize → verify → handoff. One production loop across atoms, materials, chips, bio, and chemistry.
landing.pipeline_sub: discover seeds it; verify closes it. Every stage is a deterministic surface — not a chat.
landing.feat_verify_body: A 5-tier calculator returns the verdict — zero LLM judgments. Every claim carries its provenance.
landing.feat_i18n_body: Primitives proven in one domain carry into the next — the NEXUS reuse lattice (e.g. RTSC current_loop → ANTIMATTER trap). Redo work goes to zero.
landing.feat_gcp_body: Vertex AI · Cloud Run · Firestore · Secret Manager. Metadata-server auth — zero secrets in code.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: The 8-verb pipeline, the CLI surface, and personal access tokens — everything to drive demiurge from web or terminal.
docs.pipeline_intro: demiurge drives a single generic pipeline: a discovery head feeds the 7-verb spine spec → structure → design → analyze ⟲ → synthesize → verify → handoff. Each verb is either an LLM draft step (Gemini, server-side) or a CLI / engine step (the demiurge binary). The loop on analyze marks the iterate-until-converged cycle.
docs.verb_discover: Diverge a new domain or break a gap (kick / gap discovery engine).
docs.verb_spec: Define the targets and constraints — what @goal must satisfy.
docs.verb_structure: Lay out the structure and topology of the design.
docs.verb_design: Circuit / schematic design from the structured spec.
docs.verb_analyze: Simulate and analyze in iterative rounds (the ⟲ loop).
docs.verb_synth: Produce the synthesis recipe / fabrication route.
docs.verb_verify: Emit a 5-tier verdict with provenance — the typed record.
docs.verb_handoff: Bundle the completed-form handoff dossier for the next stage.
docs.cli_intro: Every verb is reachable from the terminal through one generic dispatch. Install the toolchain, authenticate once, then drive any domain.
docs.cli_install_note: hexa-lang ships the 'hexa' runtime + 'hx' package manager; demiurge installs as a managed package.
docs.cli_auth_note: Paste the personal access token from your account (see PAT section below).
docs.cli_invoke_note: General form: demiurge cli <verb> <domain>. The structure / synth / verify verbs dispatch through the action form; discover takes a free-text seed.
docs.cli_ex_discover: Diverge a new domain from a free-text seed
docs.cli_ex_structure: Build the structure record for a domain
docs.pat_intro: A PAT authenticates the CLI and the /api/v1 surface against your web account, so terminal and browser share one identity.
docs.pat_step_issue: Issue a token from Account → CLI tab. (Token issuance is rolling out; until it lands, the CLI runs against your local install.)
docs.pat_step_store: Store it with the CLI — it is kept in your OS keychain, never echoed back.
docs.pat_step_use: Authenticated calls then carry the token automatically.
docs.pat_security_note: Treat a PAT like a password: scope it, rotate it, and revoke it from the same Account → CLI tab. The web GUI calls Gemini server-side, so model tokens are never exposed to the browser.

discover.subtitle: 8th verb (head) · objective + verifier → verified candidate catalog · phanes-owned OUROBOROS loop (d3/d4)
discover.objective_label: objective — define the candidate to discover (one line)
discover.objective_placeholder: e.g. RTSC candidate at 300K ambient pressure, BCS-validated
discover.contract_note: ⚠ If the phanes CLI (bin/phanes) is not installed: friendly error + contract guidance (~/core/phanes/INBOX.log.md::demiurge-discover-bridge).
